Comment.value: Called from a button in Package Settings - only developers
Can also be called from script Publish All Remote CL
Called from Clone Publish Packages (which is called from CONTENT CLONE MASTER)
This script does not only export content from FAT but also instructs the Task Server to build a new code version.

Calculation.Text: "When pressing the OK button, the FAT will begin building a new version of this package with the selected code base. This will take a few minutes and you will receive an email with a link when the new version is ready for preview or download."

Comment.value: Call from the Code package overview
typeOfTask /* sync - syncing new content from FAT to Preview server publish - building a new package with both content from FAT and code from GitLab */

exportMode /* JSON = All JSON files TEXT = JSON + all TEXT files Media update = JSON + TEXT + updated media - This option is for Authors and Editors Media all = JSON + TEXT + all media Translation = TEXT and Subtitles for localised language (only remote export) Translation files = TEXT and Subtitles for localised language (only local export) */

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::Base project ); "" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::Base project ); "" ; FAT Package::Package type id)

Comment.value: Preview server
URL to the server where we will upload content and code - i.e test.quiddity.se.

Calculation.Text: FAT Title::Reference title & " • " & FAT Package::Reference name
"Please type an email address where the download link should be sent to."

Comment.value: jobTypes /* CODE_UPDATE or List with SCORM_12,SCORM_2004,WEB_LINK,XAPI */
funkisCodeBase /* A String identifyer for TaskServer to know what to build. Could in the future be completely replaced by branchSettings. */

branchSettings /* A JSON given by Codebase choice. Each Codebase have a set of different code packages and branches and gives the task server detailed information of what to build. Handled in a separate table. */

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty (FAT Package::GitLab Project code URL) ; Base Project @ Title::GitLabURL; FAT Package::GitLab Project code URL ) /*If not using specific project code on GitLab - use GitLab code defined by BaseProject */

Comment.value: Check if codebase supports the package type

Calculation.Text: Not PatternCount ( Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Package type ; $package_type)
"You have selected a codebase that cannot build this kind of package type. Please change the codebase for this package. "

Comment.value: Get codebase version string (can be latest, next etc.
Before updating code or building - validate that the included building blocks are compatible with codebase version.

Calculation.Text: "The following building blocks in this package does not seem to be compatible with the selected codebase version:¶¶" & Get(ScriptResult) & "¶Do you want to proceed anyway?"

Comment.value: Check if package reports completed
If we try to build a Funkis Codebase branch -> set the variable funkisCodeBaseVersion to the branchname since Task Server will not make any difference.
Update to preview server
Build a delivery package for download and create a build log entry
Development export - uncomment for fault trace
First package when creating new titile is PSOS

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "emailToNotifyWhenDone" ; $emailToNotifyWhenDone )& SetProperty ( "title_header" ; $title_header ) & SetProperty ( "GitLabURL" ; $GitLabURL ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir )& SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode )& SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget )& SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBase" ; $funkisCodeBase ) & SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; $jobTypes ) & SetProperty ( "branchSettings" ; $branchSettings ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBaseShortName" ; $funkisCodeBaseShortName ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBaseVersion" ; $funkisCodeBaseVersion ) & SetProperty ( "build_id" ; $build_id )

Comment.value: Developer can publish new versions and create packages

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "emailToNotifyWhenDone" ; $emailToNotifyWhenDone )& SetProperty ( "title_header" ; $title_header ) & SetProperty ( "GitLabURL" ; $GitLabURL ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir )& SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode )& SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget )& SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBase" ; $funkisCodeBase ) & SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; $jobTypes ) & SetProperty ( "branchSettings" ; $branchSettings ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBaseShortName" ; $funkisCodeBaseShortName ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBaseVersion" ; $funkisCodeBaseVersion ) & SetProperty ( "build_id" ; $build_id )

Comment.value: Publishing new Title information in the background

Calculation.Text: Not isPSOS And Not isTitleInformation ( $package_type ) // Title information shall not be previewed

Comment.value: Reset backend if changed
